title: FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SILVERTON AREA COMMUNITY AID FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency rent and utility assistance (electric, water, sewer, gas, and propane). Assistance is dependent on available funds, and clients are encouraged to contribute if they can. 1030 N 1st Street Suite A Silverton, OR 97381 Eligibility: Households must meet Silverton Area Community Aid Income Guidelines Hours: Monday 11am-2pm, Tuesday 4pm-6pm, Thursday 9am-noon Email (503) 873-3446 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 873-3446 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for information and the current Silverton Area Community Aid Income Guidelines FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income and copies of utility bills or rental agreement LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Silver Falls School District (Cities of Scotts Mills and Silverton) SITE HOURS: Monday 11am-2pm, Tuesday 4pm-6pm, Thursday 9am-noon Call to schedule an appointment outside of walk-in hours TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to the Dollar General and across the street from the McDonald's. Park on the Dollar General side of the building. Services: Dental Care Expense Assistance Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Medical Care Expense Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PROGRAM TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION AND PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SILVERTON AREA COMMUNITY AID
